name: medmin-m365
description: Connect Claude to your Medmin Microsoft 365 account — calendar, email, and Teams meeting transcripts.
long_description:
Gives Claude access to your Microsoft 365 account via the Microsoft Graph API.

After installing, open Claude and ask: **"set up my Medmin M365 connection"** — Claude will walk you through signing in.

**What Claude can do once connected:**
- Fetch and analyse Teams meeting transcripts
- Search your calendar and find meetings
- Search your email
- Show a full guide to available tools

**Requirements:** You must have organised the meeting in Teams and have had transcription active during the call.

tools.name: accounts_add
tools.description: Sign in to a Microsoft 365 account via device-code flow

tools.name: accounts_complete
tools.description: Complete Microsoft 365 sign-in after visiting the browser link

tools.name: calendar_list_events
tools.description: List calendar events in a date range

tools.name: mail_search
tools.description: Search email by keyword, sender, or date

tools.name: meetings_get_by_join_url
tools.description: Look up a Teams online meeting by its join URL

tools.name: meetings_list_transcripts
tools.description: List all transcripts for a Teams meeting

tools.name: meetings_get_transcript
tools.description: Download a Teams meeting transcript in VTT format

tools.name: medmin_guide
tools.description: Show the Medmin guide — what Claude can do and how to use it
